summary: Frontend-only marketing site for Baker's Glove tested thoroughly. All required data-testids present, all tel:/WhatsApp hrefs correct, all 10 product/custom images load (naturalWidth=1200), hero heading/subheading/rating verified, mobile (390px) drawer and section rendering verified. No console errors. Site loads cleanly.

issues: Image shown (Unsplash photo-1578775887804-699de7086ff9) looks like a white cheesecake with red berry topping, which doesn't visually match the product description 'Rich dark chocolate indulgence — layers of ganache, a whisper of sea salt, finished with a mirror glaze.' The image LOADS correctly (no broken URL), but is a content/brand mismatch for the 'Signature' dark chocolate product. Main agent may want to swap the URL to an actual dark chocolate cake photo.

action_items: Consider replacing the Dark Night bestseller image URL in /app/frontend/src/data/bakersGloveData.js (currently shows a red-berry cheesecake, product is described as a dark chocolate ganache cake). Image loads fine but is off-brand for a 'Signature' dark chocolate product.
critical_code_review_comments: visit-map wrapper is a DIV with the data-testid; the Google Maps iframe lives inside it. Test passes because iframe is present inside the wrapper, but if a downstream test strictly asserts element.tagName === 'IFRAME' on data-testid=visit-map it would fail. Current implementation is acceptable.
All interactive elements have appropriate data-testid attributes — good testability coverage.
Tel and WhatsApp URLs correctly match spec exactly (tel:+919916554504 and https://wa.me/919916554504).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static frontend-only marketing site. All 44 required data-testids verified present. All tel: CTAs = tel:+919916554504, WhatsApp FAB + contact-whatsapp-btn = https://wa.me/919916554504 (with ?text= query appended — still matches base URL requirement). All 6 bestseller images + 4 custom cake images load with naturalWidth=1200. Hero heading 'Where every occasion gets sweeter', has 'Jayanagar' and '4.6' + '918' in rating. All testimonial names (Ananya R., Siddharth K., Deepa M.) present. Visit hours shows '10:00 AM – 11:30 PM'. Mobile 390px: nav-mobile-toggle opens drawer with all 4 links, all 8 sections render, WhatsApp FAB fixed bottom-right. Title + og:title tags contain 'Baker's Glove'. Zero console errors/warnings. Only soft feedback: The Dark Night product image content doesn't match its dark-chocolate description (shows berry cheesecake).
